title: agrostis muricata
intro: Agrostis muricata, also known as sea bent or sea bent grass, is a type of coastal grass that is native to the eastern coast of North America. The medicinal properties of Agrostis muricata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Agrostis muricata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
